---
title: "Polycopié"
subtitle: "Notes de cours et chapitres au format PDF"
toc: false
---

::: {.casc-info-banner}
<i class="bi bi-book-half"></i>

Polycopié rédigé par **Urbain Vaes**. Téléchargez le document complet ou consultez chaque chapitre individuellement.
:::

[<i class="bi bi-file-earmark-pdf-fill"></i> Notes complètes (PDF)](https://urbain.vaes.uk/static/teaching/scientific_computing/build/main.pdf){.casc-btn .casc-btn-primary target="_blank" rel="noopener"}

## [Chapitres]{.casc-section-title}

```{=html}
<div class="grid">
  <div class="g-col-12 g-col-md-6">
    <a class="casc-chapter-card" href="https://urbain.vaes.uk/static/teaching/scientific_computing/build/introduction.pdf" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
      <span class="casc-chapter-num">0</span>
      <span class="casc-chapter-title">Introduction</span>
    </a>
  </div>
  <div class="g-col-12 g-col-md-6">
    <a class="casc-chapter-card" href="https://urbain.vaes.uk/static/teaching/scientific_computing/build/roundoff.pdf" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
      <span class="casc-chapter-num">1</span>
      <span class="casc-chapter-title">Floating point arithmetic</span>
    </a>
  </div>
  <div class="g-col-12 g-col-md-6">
    <a class="casc-chapter-card" href="https://urbain.vaes.uk/static/teaching/scientific_computing/build/interpolation_approximation.pdf" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
      <span class="casc-chapter-num">2</span>
      <span class="casc-chapter-title">Interpolation and approximation</span>
    </a>
  </div>
  <div class="g-col-12 g-col-md-6">
    <a class="casc-chapter-card" href="https://urbain.vaes.uk/static/teaching/scientific_computing/build/numerical_integration.pdf" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
      <span class="casc-chapter-num">3</span>
      <span class="casc-chapter-title">Numerical integration</span>
    </a>
  </div>
  <div class="g-col-12 g-col-md-6">
    <a class="casc-chapter-card" href="https://urbain.vaes.uk/static/teaching/scientific_computing/build/linear_equations.pdf" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
      <span class="casc-chapter-num">4</span>
      <span class="casc-chapter-title">Solving linear equations</span>
    </a>
  </div>
  <div class="g-col-12 g-col-md-6">
    <a class="casc-chapter-card" href="https://urbain.vaes.uk/static/teaching/scientific_computing/build/nonlinear_equations.pdf" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
      <span class="casc-chapter-num">5</span>
      <span class="casc-chapter-title">Solving nonlinear equations</span>
    </a>
  </div>
  <div class="g-col-12 g-col-md-6">
    <a class="casc-chapter-card" href="https://urbain.vaes.uk/static/teaching/scientific_computing/build/eigenproblems.pdf" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
      <span class="casc-chapter-num">6</span>
      <span class="casc-chapter-title">Eigenvalues and eigenvectors</span>
    </a>
  </div>
  <div class="g-col-12 g-col-md-6">
    <a class="casc-chapter-card" href="https://urbain.vaes.uk/static/teaching/scientific_computing/build/odes.pdf" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
      <span class="casc-chapter-num">7</span>
      <span class="casc-chapter-title">Numerical integration of ODEs</span>
    </a>
  </div>
  <div class="g-col-12 g-col-md-6">
    <a class="casc-chapter-card" href="https://urbain.vaes.uk/static/teaching/scientific_computing/build/optimization.pdf" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
      <span class="casc-chapter-num">8</span>
      <span class="casc-chapter-title">Numerical optimization</span>
    </a>
  </div>
</div>
```

## [Annexes]{.casc-section-title}

```{=html}
<div class="grid">
  <div class="g-col-12 g-col-md-6">
    <a class="casc-chapter-card" href="https://urbain.vaes.uk/static/teaching/scientific_computing/build/matrices.pdf" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
      <span class="casc-chapter-num appendix">A</span>
      <span class="casc-chapter-title">Linear algebra</span>
    </a>
  </div>
  <div class="g-col-12 g-col-md-6">
    <a class="casc-chapter-card" href="https://urbain.vaes.uk/static/teaching/scientific_computing/build/julia.pdf" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
      <span class="casc-chapter-num appendix">B</span>
      <span class="casc-chapter-title">Introduction to Julia</span>
    </a>
  </div>
  <div class="g-col-12 g-col-md-6">
    <a class="casc-chapter-card" href="https://urbain.vaes.uk/static/teaching/scientific_computing/build/chebyshev.pdf" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
      <span class="casc-chapter-num appendix">C</span>
      <span class="casc-chapter-title">Chebyshev polynomials</span>
    </a>
  </div>
  <div class="g-col-12 g-col-md-6">
    <a class="casc-chapter-card" href="https://urbain.vaes.uk/static/teaching/scientific_computing/build/references.pdf" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
      <span class="casc-chapter-num appendix"><i class="bi bi-book"></i></span>
      <span class="casc-chapter-title">Bibliography</span>
    </a>
  </div>
</div>
```
